_comment: A passing candidate, hand-authored to prove the contract under the per-matchup floor (slice 2). Frost striker: a Shielded front body tanks the first hits, poisons what it strikes (chipping fat status-stacked boards over time) and curses to weaken it; a durable mid and a body give it staying power vs the attrition meta. Overall ~64.7% (in [35,65]) with every matchup above the 25% floor (Aggro 100% / SustainControl 64% / StatStack 30%) — broadly viable, not a one-matchup hard-counter. The pre-floor fixture (curse-only, no Shield/Poison) sat at 100/62/0 and passed the pooled band at 54% while folding StatStack to 0%; the floor bounces that, which is the evidence it works.
